title: Vanilla Blades
description: Minecraft sword textures. Same shape, different materials
body:
**Vanilla Blades** is a texture pack for Minecraft that updates the appearance of vanilla swords. All swords use the same shape, while each material has a unique texture reflecting its characteristics. Included materials: wood, stone, iron, gold, diamond, and netherite. The pack improves visual clarity and consistency for players

![Diamond and Netherite swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/614f561beafc702028dae95311fa31f906f6cd9c.png)

_made by sparklex.team_
